sections.title: Bank Account
sections.subtitle: A conversation about opening a bank account

questions.question: Customer name: _______
questions.explanation: The customer's name is Mike Brown.|客户名字是Mike Brown。

questions.question: Account type: _______ account
questions.explanation: He wants to open a current account.|他想开一个活期账户。

questions.question: Address: 8 _______ Avenue
questions.explanation: He lives at 8 Elm Avenue.|他住在榆树大道8号。

questions.question: Date of birth: 10 July _______
questions.explanation: His date of birth is 10 July 1990.|他的出生日期是1990年7月10日。

questions.question: What ID does he provide?
questions.explanation: He provides his passport as ID.|他提供护照作为身份证明。

questions.question: Opening deposit: £_______
questions.explanation: He deposits 100 pounds.|他存入100英镑。

questions.question: Does he want online banking?
questions.explanation: He signs up for online banking.|他注册了网上银行。

questions.question: Overdraft limit requested: £_______
questions.explanation: He requests a 500 pound overdraft limit.|他要求500英镑的透支限额。

questions.question: Monthly salary: £_______
questions.explanation: His monthly salary is 2500 pounds.|他的月薪是2500英镑。

questions.question: Account number assigned: _______
questions.explanation: His account number is 40372918.|他的账号是40372918。
